message:
Here's something wonderful about that rumbly little engine in your lap: a cat's purr vibrates at roughly 25 to 150 Hz — the same low-frequency range that studies link to healing bone, easing pain, and lowering stress. 🐱💛

So when your cat curls up and purrs you into a calmer mood, the science suggests it might genuinely be doing you some good. Not a bad deal from a free therapist who naps 16 hours a day.

Comment 🐾 if your cat's purr is one of your favorite sounds in the whole world!
